content: Hi, I'm Skyler. I'm a Podcast Host covering true crime, and I'm trying to get my finances in order. I'm currently finishing up my part-time MBA in Salt Lake City, UT.
Hi Skyler, congratulations on your MBA! That's a big accomplishment. Can you tell me a bit more about your financial situation and what you're hoping to achieve?

Well, I've got a good income from my podcast, but I'm not sure if I'm saving enough for the future. I've been trying to learn more about personal finance and investing, but it's a lot to take in. I've also been enjoying hiking in the mountains around Salt Lake City.
Hiking is a great way to clear your mind! And it's great that you're taking an interest in personal finance. Have you considered creating a budget or talking to a financial advisor?

Yeah, I've thought about it. I've been using a budgeting app to track my expenses, but I'm not sure if it's accurate. I've also been trying to save up for a tennis tournament in California, it's $1,200.
That sounds like a great tournament! Tennis is a wonderful sport. Maybe we can explore ways to make sure your budget is accurate and help you reach your savings goal.
That would be great, thanks. I've also been thinking about taking up calligraphy as a new hobby, but I'm not sure if I can afford the equipment.
Calligraphy is a beautiful art form! Maybe we can discuss ways to prioritize your expenses and make room for the equipment in your budget.
Yeah, that would be great. I've been trying to balance my time between my podcast, my MBA, and my hobbies, but it's hard to make everything work.
I understand. It can be tough to balance multiple responsibilities. Have you considered setting aside specific days for each activity, so you can make sure to prioritize everything?
That's a great idea, thanks. I've also been thinking about investing in a rental property in Salt Lake City, but I'm not sure if it's a good idea.
Investing in real estate can be a great way to build wealth! Maybe we can discuss the pros and cons of investing in a rental property and help you make a decision.
That would be great, thanks. I've been trying to learn as much as I can about personal finance and investing, but it's a lot to take in.
It's great that you're taking the initiative to learn! Maybe we can break down your goals and create a plan to achieve them, one step at a time.
That sounds like a great plan, thanks. I'm looking forward to finishing my MBA and starting my new career.
You're welcome, Skyler! It was my pleasure to help. I'm sure you'll do great things with your new career and your podcast.
Thanks, I appreciate it. I'm hoping to have a successful podcast and be able to support myself financially.
That's a great goal! I'm sure you'll achieve it with hard work and dedication. Remember to stay focused and prioritize your finances, and you'll be on your way to success.
